fire_bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire_bolt.description: A mote of fire is hurled at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack.

ray_of_frost.name: Ray of Frost
ray_of_frost.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature within range. On hit, its speed is reduced by 10 feet.

vicious_mockery.name: Vicious Mockery
vicious_mockery.description: You unleash a string of insults. Target must succeed on a Wis save or take damage and have disadvantage on its next attack roll.

magic_missile.name: Magic Missile
magic_missile.description: Creates three glowing darts of magical force. Each deals 1d4+1 force damage. They always hit.

cure_wounds.name: Cure Wounds
cure_wounds.description: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting modifier.

guiding_bolt.name: Guiding Bolt
guiding_bolt.description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature. On hit, the next attack roll against this target has advantage.

scorching_ray.name: Scorching Ray
scorching_ray.description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. Each deals 2d6 fire damage.

spiritual_weapon.name: Spiritual Weapon
spiritual_weapon.description: You create a floating, spectral weapon within range that lasts for the duration or until you cast this spell again.

hold_person.name: Hold Person
hold_person.description: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wis save or be paralyzed.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: A bright streak flashes from your finger, then blossoms into an explosion of flame. Dex save for half damage.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: A stroke of lightning forming a line 100 feet long blasts out from you. Dex save for half damage.

haste.name: Haste
haste.description: Target's speed is doubled, +2 AC, advantage on Dex saves, and gain an additional action each turn.

blight.name: Blight
blight.description: Necrotic energy washes over a creature of your choice. Con save for half damage.

wall_of_fire.name: Wall of Fire
wall_of_fire.description: You create a wall of fire on a solid surface within range. Deals damage to creatures within 10 feet of it.

cone_of_cold.name: Cone of Cold
cone_of_cold.description: A blast of cold air emits from your hands. Con save for half damage.

hold_monster.name: Hold Monster
hold_monster.description: Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wis save or be paralyzed.

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.description: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target and then to three other targets. Dex save for half damage.

disintegrate.name: Disintegrate
disintegrate.description: A thin green ray springs from your finger. If it reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is disintegrated.

finger_of_death.name: Finger of Death
finger_of_death.description: You send negative energy coursing through a creature. Con save for half damage.

prismatic_spray.name: Prismatic Spray
prismatic_spray.description: Eight multicolored rays of light flash from your hand. Each ray has a different power and purpose.

sunburst.name: Sunburst
sunburst.description: Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 60-foot radius. Con save for half damage and to avoid being blinded.

power_word_stun.name: Power Word Stun
power_word_stun.description: You speak a word of power. If the target has 150 hit points or fewer, it is stunned.

meteor_swarm.name: Meteor Swarm
meteor_swarm.description: Blazing orbs of fire plummet to the ground at four different points. Dex save for half damage.

power_word_kill.name: Power Word Kill
power_word_kill.description: You utter a word of power that can compel one creature you can see within range to die instantly if it has 100 HP or less.
